hooks.name: kelix-spec-to-backlog
hooks.description: When a Kiro spec's tasks.md is saved, offer to seed the Kelix backlog from it so the loop can run the spec overnight.

action.prompt: A Kiro spec task list was just saved. If the user wants Kelix to execute this spec autonomously, run `kelix init --from-spec <spec-name>` (derive <spec-name> from the saved path) and show them the imported backlog entries in .kelix/backlog.md. Ask before running anything else.

hooks.name: kelix-run-guard
hooks.description: Block accidental agent pushes to main from within Kiro sessions in a Kelix repo.

action.command: sh -c 'read -r input; case "$input" in *"git push"*" main"*|*"git push"*"--force"*) echo "blocked by kelix-run-guard: PRs only, no pushes to main" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0'
